def negative_validation_or_parse_error_mapped_to_500_status():
    rule_id = "validation_or_parse_error_mapped_to_500_status"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "ValueError or ValidationError caught and mapped to HTTP 500 instead of a 4xx client-error status."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
